pack_intro: Quick facts about your life — helps AI give relevant, grounded answers.

questions.question: What do you do for work?
questions.why_this_matters: Shapes every work-related suggestion AI gives you.
questions.placeholder: e.g. freelance developer, marketing manager, student, between jobs

questions.question: What industry or company? (optional — helps AI understand your world)
questions.why_this_matters: Industry context makes recommendations much more relevant.
questions.placeholder: e.g. SaaS startup, retail chain, university, own business

questions.question: Where are you based?
questions.why_this_matters: Location affects timezone, currency, local recommendations.
questions.placeholder: e.g. Kraków, Poland / NYC / remote, traveling

questions.question: Life stage right now?
questions.why_this_matters: Priorities differ wildly between a student and a parent of 3.

options.label: Student — still learning, building skills
options.export_rule: I'm a student. Prioritize learning, budget-friendly options, and career building.

options.label: Early career — proving myself, growing fast
options.export_rule: I'm early career — optimize for growth, visibility, and skill-building.

options.label: Established — know what I'm doing, optimizing
options.export_rule: I'm established professionally. Focus on optimization, delegation, and leverage.

options.label: Building my own thing — founder / freelancer
options.export_rule: I'm building my own business. Everything should serve revenue, growth, or sustainability.

options.label: In transition — changing direction
options.export_rule: I'm in career transition. Help me explore options and make decisions, not optimize the old path.

options.label: Parent — time is scarce, priorities shifted
options.export_rule: I have kids. Time is extremely scarce. Prioritize efficiency and don't suggest time-heavy approaches.

questions.question: What are you currently focused on? Your main project or goal right now.
questions.why_this_matters: Helps AI connect everything back to what matters most to you right now.
questions.placeholder: e.g. launching a product, learning Rust, job search, getting healthy

questions.question: Tools you use daily? (helps AI integrate with your workflow)
questions.why_this_matters: AI suggestions work better when they fit your existing tools.
questions.placeholder: e.g. VS Code, Notion, Slack, Figma, Google Sheets

questions.question: Besides your main work — any other areas you know well?
questions.why_this_matters: AI won't over-explain things you already know, even outside your main field.
questions.placeholder: e.g. marketing, cooking, music production, investing, psychology
